qrDisplay.title: Live QR Code
qrDisplay.subtitle: Employees should scan this code to check in or check out
qrDisplay.fetchError: Failed to fetch QR code. Please check your connection.
qrDisplay.step1: Display this QR code on your screen
qrDisplay.step2: Each employee scans the code from their device
qrDisplay.step3: First scan = Check-in, second scan = Check-out
qrDisplay.step4: Code refreshes automatically after each scan

qrScanner.title: Scan QR Code
qrScanner.subtitle: Use your camera or upload a screenshot
qrScanner.uploadHint: PNG, JPG, or screenshot of the QR code
qrScanner.readError: Could not read a QR code from this image. Try a clearer screenshot.
qrScanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
qrScanner.cameraStep1: Tap "Start Scanning" and allow camera access
qrScanner.cameraStep2: Point your camera at the manager's QR code
qrScanner.cameraStep3: Hold steady until the code is detected
qrScanner.cameraStep4: First scan = check-in, second scan = check-out
qrScanner.uploadStep1: Take a screenshot of the manager's QR code
qrScanner.uploadStep2: Tap the upload area and select the image
qrScanner.uploadStep3: The QR code will be read automatically
qrScanner.uploadStep4: First scan = check-in, second scan = check-out

attendance.title: Attendance Records
attendance.subtitle: View and filter all employee attendance
attendance.mySubtitle: View your attendance history and earnings
attendance.noRecordsHint: Records will appear here once employees check in

export.title: Export PDF Report
export.subtitle: Generate and download attendance reports as PDF
export.allEmployeesHint: Leave empty to export all employees
export.allTimeHint: Leave empty to export all time
export.error: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage employees and managers
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
